title.en: In a flash, hundreds of thousands of years have...

content.en:
The impact of the Forbidden Ancient Well was very widespread, even though the forbidden treasures were almost finished, there were still many True Ancestors who wanted to enter the Forbidden Ancient Well.

But the forbidden land created by the Forbidden Ancient Well is not something that anyone can step into, so the major forces began to join forces to transform the Forbidden Ancient Well and turn the Forbidden Ancient Well into a cultivation treasure land, so that True Monarchs and True Ancestors can enter and cultivate.

And transformation requires a very huge price, so it will definitely cost a lot for non-sect disciples to enter cultivation.

This time, Black Wind Mountain also stepped out of the dark and into the open, and also participated.

Those Dao Mountain Realm forces also participated, but the benefits they received were very low, but they didn't dare to ask too much, after all, their current strength was far inferior to the Upper Triple Heaven forces.

If it weren't for the fact that the forces of the Upper Triple Heaven themselves were not united, and this time they fought each other, the relationship would have been even worse, otherwise forces like the Temple of the Gods would not be able to benefit at all.

Ye Tian didn't look down on the current Forbidden Ancient Well, so he didn't care about it, but he still arranged for some Terran geniuses and some geniuses of the Nine Pole Legion to enter it.

In a flash, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

During this period of time, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was still relatively bottlenecked, and there were no forbidden treasure lands, but the major forces sent a lot of disciples to explore all over the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, once they found the forbidden treasure land, I am afraid they would arrive as soon as possible, not as slow as the forbidden ancient wells of the Konjac True Kingdom.

Otherwise, they would definitely arrive before the mysterious force of the Heavenly Spirit Sect was destroyed, so as to plunder the treasures of the Forbidden Ancient Well.

During this time, the Nine Extremes Legion developed rapidly, and more and more Terran geniuses were willing to join the Nine Extremes Legion, and now the number of True Ancestors of the Nine Extremes Legion has reached more than 2,000 people.

And the number of true ancestors of the human race is even higher, almost reaching as much as 300,000, which is also based on the huge number of the human race.

In the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, there are very few races that can have such a huge population like the human race, although many races are also large enough, but they are basically beast races with no intelligence.

In the area of intelligent races, the human race can be called the first, otherwise it would not be possible to give birth to so many geniuses.

There are many geniuses in the human race, and many geniuses have even joined some of the Upper Triple Heaven forces, and Ye Tian has no way to ban them all.

Besides, even he joined Black Wind Mountain, why couldn't others join other Upper Triple Heaven forces?

Therefore, Ye Tian also let it go.

Moreover, this is also good for the Terrans, after all, the Terrans have joined enough Upper Triple Heaven forces, and those Upper Triple Heaven Forces are embarrassed to target the Terrans.

It can be said that the future of the human race is still bright.

And Ye Tian's progress during this period of time is also very fast, the Great Wilderness Law Body has been cultivated by him to the peak realm of Dacheng, and he is only one step away from stepping into the consummation realm.

Moreover, he could feel that he had almost broken the shackles of the bottleneck, and he was really only a little short of breaking through.

He could even feel that there was even something in the depths of the soul source, which he believed was the supreme source.

However, he was still a little behind.

It is very difficult for the Great Wilderness Dharma Body to break through to the Consummation Realm from the peak realm of Dacheng, even if his Dao-level natal talent far exceeds the Dao-level natal talent of other people, and there are seven Xuanxu Ancient Realm records to increase the cultivation speed, it is also very difficult to raise the Middle Thousand Dao Technique to the Consummation Realm.

If it were someone else, it would be almost delusional, and there would be no hope.

"Huh, that kid is gone?"

Ye Tian frowned.

He had used a self-created Positioning Origin Divine Power on his son Ye Xingchen, called the Void Positioning Technique, which was difficult for even ordinary True Ancestors to crack.

But just now, he sensed that the Void Positioning Technique had failed.

At the first time, he was a little nervous, for fear that something would happen to his son.

But there is no problem with the bloodline induction, if something really happens to Ye Xingchen, the bloodline induction aspect will make him feel shocked, but there is no such situation at present.

He then did the math, but didn't come up with anything.

The rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm are very powerful, even Dao Ancestors are difficult to deduce anything, not to mention that now that the taboo rules have begun to be integrated into the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, it is too difficult to calculate the specific situation.

According to Ye Tian's guess, Ye Xingchen should have fallen into a special place somewhere.

At this moment, a top true ancestor of the Nine Extremes Legion came with a message.

This top true ancestor is a top true ancestor who has recently broken through, and he was sent by him to protect Ye Xingchen, and now that he has been summoned, he must be reporting on Ye Xingchen's situation.

"General, the young master has entered a strange star, and he can't sense it!"

The top true ancestor reported.

"You wait there, I'll go over!"

Ye Tian summoned the past and said.

Swish!

Ye Tian used Tiangang's extreme speed and quickly left the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

Not long after, Ye Tian walked out of the void and came to a silent starry sky.

There's an ancient star standing there, surrounded by just a few ordinary uninhabited stars and a few meteorite belts.

It looks very ordinary, and the star doesn't seem to move.

After Ye Tian came here, several True Ancestors of the Nine Extremes Legion appeared, and they all bent down and said respectfully: "General!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately used his copying talent to envelop this primeval star, but he was disappointed.

He couldn't sense any breath of life, as if the star shielded his talent for replication.

His copying talent is so powerful, and this star can block his copying talent, which is not easy.

"You guys go back first, I'll go in and have a look!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

Several True Ancestors replied.

They actually sent a branch to check, but they couldn't find anything, and they couldn't find Ye Xingchen at all, so it was useless to stay here.

After several True Ancestors left, Ye Tian copied his body and let this body enter this star.

He was not worried about his own safety, but he was afraid that if he was caught in it, then there would be no one to save his son.

So, he has to be careful.

......

Inside the ancient stars.

Ye Tian came in, it seemed that it was very ordinary here, similar to ordinary stars.

The only thing that is a little shocking is that there are a lot of creatures here, but he can't detect the talent of any creature at all with his copying talent outside the stars.

But now that I came in, I saw so many creatures, and the replication talent could also be detected.

Obviously, it is some kind of rule of the stars that restricts the detection of outside forces.

"After Xingchen came in, he must have entered a certain place, I just need to find that place!" Ye Tian muttered.

I saw that Ye Tian used one of his clones to use his own talents, and one by one the clones appeared, these clones had no power, but they were very useful for exploration.

Dense and countless clones began to shuttle towards the stars, almost all over the entire planet.

No matter how secret or special the place is, it is difficult to hide this kind of detection method.

Not long after, a clone suddenly disappeared, completely losing its sense with Ye Tian.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian put away all the clones and returned to power.

Immediately, Ye Tian came to the place where the body disappeared.

This is an abyss, if the divine sense probes, it is a very ordinary abyss, but Ye Tian knows that this is definitely not an ordinary abyss, otherwise his doppelganger will not disappear.

Immediately.

Ye Tian jumped directly into the abyss, and suddenly a suction force came.

He didn't resist, but followed the suction.

In the blink of an eye, he came to another world.

As soon as he entered, Ye Tian's expression changed, and he sensed the faint power of the dark taboo.

"Forbidden Treasure Land, and it's also a Forbidden Treasure Land that is being conceived!"

Ye Tian thought in his heart.

This is a treasure land, but he is not excited, but worried, he is worried that something will happen to Xingchen.

Rumble!!!!

Copying talent and divine sense probed the situation here at the same time, and soon discovered his son Ye Xingchen.

At this time, Ye Xingchen's state was a little strange.

He was sitting cross-legged under a giant tree, his body was surrounded by a trace of forbidden rule, and the power of dark forbidden was circulating inside his body.

But his breath of life is very steady, but it is climbing at an incredible speed.

In addition, he was no longer a half-step True Ancestor, but had been promoted to the True Ancestor realm.

"This is the power of the dark taboo, Xingchen he has mastered the power of the dark taboo, how is this possible!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

How difficult it is to master the power of the dark taboo, he has also relied on the copied body to try again and again before he finally mastered the power of the dark taboo.

And his son Ye Xingchen doesn't have the talent to copy!

"Could it be that this is the Forbidden Divine Tree?" Ye Tian looked at the giant tree, the Forbidden Divine Tree could allow people to grasp the power of the Dark Taboo, he knew this.

But how precious the Forbidden Divine Tree is, this tree doesn't look like a Forbidden Divine Tree.

"Could it be that it is a castrated version of the Forbidden Divine Tree, and only the Dark Forbidden Domain can give birth to the Forbidden Divine Tree, but now that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has the potential to become a Forbidden Realm, it is also possible to give birth to a Forbidden Tree that is similar to the Forbidden Divine Tree but has a much lower level!" Ye Tian guessed.

He didn't touch Ye Xingchen, but accelerated the time around him, allowing him to complete the transformation early.

In the accelerated environment of time, only a few days have passed in the outside world, and Ye Xingchen has completely completed his transformation and awakened.
